name: loop_host_forensics_fast
description: 从文件或 inputs 读取主机列表，循环调用 host-forensics-fast 子 Agent，结果追加写入日志文件并生成总结报告

nodes.name: 初始化主机列表与日志
nodes.description: 解析 hosts_file / hosts，去重；在当日 outputs 目录创建 batch_host_triage_log.md 并写入标题；设置循环变量。
nodes.code:
import datetime
import os
from pathlib import Path
from flocks.workspace.manager import WorkspaceManager

hosts = inputs.get("hosts")
if hosts is None:
    hosts = []
if isinstance(hosts, str):
    hosts = [hosts.strip()] if str(hosts).strip() else []
elif not isinstance(hosts, list):
    hosts = []

hosts_file = str(inputs.get("hosts_file") or "").strip()
if hosts_file:
    p = Path(hosts_file).expanduser()
    if p.is_file():
        for line in p.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
            line = line.strip()
            if not line or line.startswith("#"):
                continue
            hosts.append(line)

seen = set()
uniq = []
for h in hosts:
    hs = str(h).strip()
    if not hs or hs in seen:
        continue
    seen.add(hs)
    uniq.append(hs)
hosts = uniq

ws = WorkspaceManager.get_instance()
oday = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
output_dir = str(ws.get_workspace_dir() / "outputs" / oday)
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
batch_report_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_log.md")

outputs["hosts"] = hosts
outputs["host_idx"] = 0
outputs["triage_results"] = []
outputs["batch_report_path"] = batch_report_path
outputs["should_continue"] = "continue" if hosts else "exit"

if hosts:
    header = (
        "# 批量主机快速巡检日志\n\n"
        "- 开始日期: " + oday + "\n"
        "- 主机数量: " + str(len(hosts)) + "\n\n"
        "---\n\n"
    )
    with open(batch_report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(header)

nodes.name: 循环判断
nodes.description: should_continue 为 continue 则巡检下一台，为 exit 则结束循环

nodes.name: 单台快速巡检
nodes.description: Tool: task(subagent_type=host-forensics-fast)。对当前主机执行快速 triage，结果追加写入 batch_report_path。
nodes.code:
hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
idx = int(inputs.get("host_idx", 0))
host = hosts[idx] if 0 <= idx < len(hosts) else ""

desc = "Fast triage " + str(host)
prompt = (
    "你是 host-forensics-fast 工作模式：对下列目标执行 Linux 主机快速安全巡检（首轮研判）。\n"
    "请使用 ssh_run_script，script_path 为 `.flocks/plugins/agents/host-forensics-fast/scripts/triage_fast.sh`，"
    "host 参数使用下列主机标识（若用户环境使用别名/跳板，请按可连接的主机名或 IP）：\n\n"
    + host
    + "\n\n请输出简洁 Markdown：结论、可疑项、风险判断、后续建议。"
)
res = tool.run_safe(
    "task",
    description=desc,
    prompt=prompt,
    subagent_type="host-forensics-fast",
    run_in_background=False,
)
text = res.get("text") or ""
ok = bool(res.get("success"))
err = res.get("error") or ""

tr = inputs.get("triage_results", [])
tr = list(tr) if isinstance(tr, list) else []
tr.append({"host": host, "success": ok, "text": text, "error": err})
outputs["triage_results"] = tr

batch_report_path = inputs.get("batch_report_path", "")
section = "\n## 主机: " + host + "\n\n"
if ok:
    section += text + "\n\n"
else:
    section += "**调用失败**: " + err + "\n\n"
section += "---\n"
if batch_report_path:
    with open(batch_report_path, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(section)

outputs["last_host"] = host
outputs["last_success"] = ok

nodes.name: 下一台主机
nodes.code:
hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
idx = int(inputs.get("host_idx", 0)) + 1
outputs["host_idx"] = idx
outputs["should_continue"] = "continue" if idx < len(hosts) else "exit"

nodes.name: 总结巡检结果
nodes.description: LLM 总结写入 batch_host_triage_summary.md；同时将完整 triage_results 写入 batch_host_triage_results.json，及逐台完整正文 batch_host_triage_raw_all.md。
nodes.code:
import datetime
import json
import os
from flocks.workspace.manager import WorkspaceManager

results = inputs.get("triage_results") or []
if not isinstance(results, list):
    results = []

ws = WorkspaceManager.get_instance()
oday = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
output_dir = str(ws.get_workspace_dir() / "outputs" / oday)
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
summary_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_summary.md")
results_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_results.json")
raw_all_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_raw_all.md")
batch_report_path = inputs.get("batch_report_path", "")
hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
if not isinstance(hosts, list):
    hosts = []

if not results:
    summary = (
        "# 批量主机快速巡检总结\n\n"
        "未提供任何可巡检主机（`hosts` 为空且未从 `hosts_file` 读取到有效行）。\n"
    )
else:
    lines = []
    for r in results:
        if not isinstance(r, dict):
            continue
        h = r.get("host", "")
        ok = r.get("success", False)
        lines.append("- " + str(h) + ": " + ("成功" if ok else "失败"))
    brief = "共巡检 " + str(len(results)) + " 台主机。\n" + "\n".join(lines)
    prompt = (
        "以下是批量 Linux 主机快速巡检的逐台结果。请用中文输出 Markdown 报告，包含：\n"
        "## 执行摘要（2-4 句）\n"
        "## 逐台要点（成功则概括结论与可疑项；失败则写原因）\n"
        "## 整体风险评估与后续建议\n\n"
        "逐台状态：\n" + brief + "\n\n详细输出（每台正文已截断）：\n"
    )
    for r in results:
        if isinstance(r, dict):
            body = str(r.get("text", ""))[:4000]
            prompt += "\n### " + str(r.get("host", "")) + "\n" + body + "\n"
    summary = llm.ask(prompt, timeout_s=300, max_retries=2, retry_delay_s=2)

with open(summary_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(summary)

bundle = {
    "date": oday,
    "hosts": hosts,
    "batch_report_path": batch_report_path,
    "summary_path": summary_path,
    "triage_results": results,
}
with open(results_json_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    json.dump(bundle, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

parts = ["# 批量巡检原始逐台输出（完整未截断）\n\n"]
for r in results:
    if not isinstance(r, dict):
        continue
    parts.append("## " + str(r.get("host", "")) + "\n\n")
    parts.append("- success: " + str(r.get("success")) + "\n")
    err = r.get("error") or ""
    if err:
        parts.append("- error:\n\n```\n" + str(err) + "\n```\n\n")
    parts.append(str(r.get("text", "")) + "\n\n---\n\n")
if not results:
    parts.append("_（无逐台记录）_\n")
with open(raw_all_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("".join(parts))

outputs["executive_summary"] = summary
outputs["summary_path"] = summary_path
outputs["results_json_path"] = results_json_path
outputs["raw_all_path"] = raw_all_path
outputs["batch_report_path"] = batch_report_path
